_comment: Retrieval eval fixture. `relevant` is a list of CORPUS INDICES (0-based) — labeling by index, not substring, so near-duplicate distractors that share vocabulary with the answer don't get miscredited. Distractors (indices 25-29) deliberately share terms with real answers. DRAFT starter — Dylan grows corpus toward 200-500 real memories and adds his real query cases.
